summary: Tested all SR (Spaced Repetition) features on frontend. All core flows work correctly. Minor: Study page SR badge shows 'SR' text not 'SMART REVIEW' but badge is present.

ui_bugs.issue: Badge text is 'SR' not 'SMART REVIEW' — may be intentional design but different from LetterSelect which shows 'SMART'

critical_code_review_comments: SettingsContext reset() sets DEFAULT_SETTINGS directly (not deep copy) — safe since DEFAULT_SETTINGS is const with no mutations
context_for_next_testing_agent: SR feature fully tested. Settings modal works: toggle default OFF, random order msg, config expands on toggle ON, sliders work, multiplier buttons work, avoid-repeat toggle works, reset works (collapses config as SR turns OFF). Persistence via localStorage confirmed. SMART REVIEW badge shows on home mode cards. SMART badge shows in LetterSelect header. Start button shows '~15 cards' for 10 letters at 1.5x. Study page shows SR=1/15 total (correct). SR OFF shows 1/10 total (correct). Study page SR badge is a small 'SR' pill (not 'SMART REVIEW' text).
